message:
test: cover standard provider names, full session IDs, and last-active column

Add E2E tests verifying that "claude" resolves to "claude-code" in both
resume target, --source flag, and list --provider filter contexts.
Confirm `casr list` now renders the full session ID without truncation,
displays a "Last Active" column, and labels the current working-directory
project scope.  Add discovery unit tests for "claude" and "gemini-cli"
standard name resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
